_schema: Spec 165 Slice 1 — FragmentVerdict{fragment_id, verdict, pointer, resolved_at}
_doctrine: verdict ∈ {'derived', 'cli_folded', 'cancelled'}. derived → SkillDoc renders from module docstring under Spec 080/081. cli_folded → the surface is reachable via `agency <cap> <verb>` per Spec 079. cancelled → won't ship; pointer cites the supersession.
_invariant: set(verdicts.fragment_id) == {F-A, F-B, F-C, F-D, F-E, F-F} (Spec 046 declares exactly these six)

verdicts.pointer: skills/develop/SKILL.md (code-review walkable; the receiving-side discipline lives in the derived skill body — Spec 080 emit pipeline)
verdicts.rationale: Code-review split (dispatch vs reception) is implicit in the develop capability's derived skill structure. The hand-authored two-skill split Spec 046 sketched is replaced by the Spec 080/081 docstring-derived discipline.

verdicts.pointer: agency delegate dispatch_decision (Spec 040, exposed via Spec 079 CLI mirror)
verdicts.rationale: Dispatch helper extension folded into `delegate.dispatch_decision` (Spec 040; the 11-signal heuristic). Spec 079's `agency delegate dispatch_decision` exposes it on the CLI.

verdicts.pointer: branch.commit_smart (Spec 046 Slice 1 SHIPPED) — skills/branch/references/commit_smart.md derives byte-equal under Spec 080
verdicts.rationale: branch.commit_smart verb shipped in 2026-06 (Spec 046 Slice 1); the SkillDoc derives from the verb's module docstring.
develop.estimate verb shipped in 2026-06; deterministic verb that estimates downstream-impact + duration of a change.

verdicts.pointer: CLAUDE.md rules 1 + 8 + the token-economy lint (Spec 067) own the discipline
verdicts.rationale: Token-economy 'discipline doc' (F-E) is supplanted by CLAUDE.md rule 1 (token-economy heuristics) + rule 8 (no hardcoded values) + the executable Spec 067 lint. A standalone doc would duplicate the doctrine.

verdicts.pointer: Spec 126 research.ingest_gdoc + Spec 092 G5 doc-drift gate
verdicts.rationale: Upstream-doc autosync (F-F) is solved generically by Spec 126's `research.ingest_gdoc` (subagent-isolated source ingest) + Spec 092 G5's doc-drift gate. Hand-rolling a plugin-development autosync script would duplicate the substrate.
